args.subject: Your Brightloom refund has been issued
Your Brightloom refund has been issued
Billing incident TCK-2201: refunds summary
args.body: Three duplicate-charge orders from the 12 May batch fault have been refunded: ORD-5501 ($19.99), ORD-5502 ($19.99), ORD-5503 ($39.98). Total $79.96. The double_charge_guard fix is live in billing-api v3.4.1. Full details in refunds-summary.md.
